themeWords.meaning: Zion; the hill in Jerusalem, figuratively the center of God’s presence

sentenceTheme: Those who fear the LORD are blessed with fruitful family life and enduring peace from Zion.

verses.text: Blessed is every one that feareth the LORD; that walketh in his ways.

highlightedWords.meaning: to fear, revere, stand in awe of

verses.text: For thou shalt eat the labour of thine hands: happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.

highlightedWords.meaning: toil, product of labor, that which is gained by effort

verses.text: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thine house: thy children like olive plants round about thy table.

highlightedWords.meaning: olive tree; source of oil, vitality, and blessing

verses.text: Behold, that thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: to bless, to endue with power for prosperity and well-being
to fear, revere, stand in awe of

verses.text: The LORD shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.

highlightedWords.meaning: Zion; the hill in Jerusalem, figuratively the center of God’s presence
Jerusalem; the chief city of Israel

verses.text: Yea, thou shalt see thy children's children, and peace upon Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: Israel; God strives, the covenant people
